testcase.name: 健康检查
testcase.system-out: GET http://127.0.0.1:8080/actuator/health expected=custom schema assertion api_code=None

testcase.name: 未登录访问仪表盘
testcase.system-out: GET http://127.0.0.1:8080/api/dashboard expected=HTTP 200 and API code 10006 api_code=10006

testcase.name: 伪造 Token 访问权限
testcase.system-out: GET http://127.0.0.1:8080/api/permissions expected=HTTP 200 and API code 10006 api_code=10006

testcase.name: 登录缺少密码
testcase.system-out: POST http://127.0.0.1:8080/api/login expected=HTTP 200 and API code 10000 api_code=10000

testcase.name: 错误密码登录
testcase.system-out: POST http://127.0.0.1:8080/api/login expected=HTTP 200 and API code 10002 api_code=10002

testcase.name: 管理员 JSON 登录兼容
testcase.system-out: POST http://127.0.0.1:8080/api/login expected=HTTP 200 and API code 20000 api_code=20000

testcase.name: JSON 登录会话退出
testcase.system-out: POST http://127.0.0.1:8080/api/logout expected=HTTP 200 and API code 20000 api_code=20000

testcase.name: 管理员表单登录
testcase.system-out: POST http://127.0.0.1:8080/api/login expected=HTTP 200 and API code 20000 api_code=20000

testcase.name: 管理员权限树
testcase.system-out: GET http://127.0.0.1:8080/api/permissions?roleName=ROLE_2 expected=HTTP 200 and API code 20000 api_code=20000

testcase.name: 仪表盘聚合数据
testcase.system-out: GET http://127.0.0.1:8080/api/dashboard expected=HTTP 200 and API code 20000 api_code=20000

testcase.name: 城市全量列表
testcase.system-out: GET http://127.0.0.1:8080/api/citys expected=HTTP 200 and API code 20000 api_code=20000

testcase.name: 城市分页列表
testcase.system-out: GET http://127.0.0.1:8080/api/citys/1/200 expected=HTTP 200 and API code 20000 api_code=20000

testcase.name: 新增城市
testcase.system-out: POST http://127.0.0.1:8080/api/citys?cityNumber=713435 expected=HTTP 200 and API code 20000 api_code=20000

testcase.name: 查询新增城市
testcase.system-out: GET http://127.0.0.1:8080/api/citys expected=HTTP 200 and API code 20000 api_code=20000

testcase.name: 重复城市错误
testcase.system-out: POST http://127.0.0.1:8080/api/citys?cityNumber=713435 expected=HTTP 200 and API code 10001 api_code=10001

testcase.name: 新增医药公司
testcase.system-out: POST http://127.0.0.1:8080/api/companys expected=HTTP 200 and API code 20000 api_code=20000

testcase.name: 查询新增医药公司
testcase.system-out: GET http://127.0.0.1:8080/api/companys/1/200?name=api-20260713T034632Z-9e2ae8-company expected=HTTP 200 and API code 20000 api_code=20000

testcase.name: 修改医药公司
testcase.system-out: PUT http://127.0.0.1:8080/api/companys/11265483 expected=HTTP 200 and API code 20000 api_code=20000

testcase.name: 新增销售地点
testcase.system-out: POST http://127.0.0.1:8080/api/sales expected=HTTP 200 and API code 20000 api_code=20000

testcase.name: 查询新增销售地点
testcase.system-out: GET http://127.0.0.1:8080/api/sales/1/200?name=api-20260713T034632Z-9e2ae8-sale expected=HTTP 200 and API code 20000 api_code=20000

testcase.name: 修改销售地点
testcase.system-out: PUT http://127.0.0.1:8080/api/sales/12635294 expected=HTTP 200 and API code 20000 api_code=20000

testcase.name: 销售地点全量列表
testcase.system-out: GET http://127.0.0.1:8080/api/sales expected=HTTP 200 and API code 20000 api_code=20000

testcase.name: 医生级别与科室字典
testcase.system-out: GET http://127.0.0.1:8080/api/doctors/info expected=HTTP 200 and API code 20000 api_code=20000

testcase.name: 新增医生
testcase.system-out: POST http://127.0.0.1:8080/api/doctors expected=HTTP 200 and API code 20000 api_code=20000

testcase.name: 查询新增医生
testcase.system-out: GET http://127.0.0.1:8080/api/doctors?pn=1&size=200&keyword=API%E6%B5%8B%E8%AF%95%E5%8C%BB%E7%94%9F9e2ae8 expected=HTTP 200 and API code 20000 api_code=20000

testcase.name: 修改医生
testcase.system-out: PUT http://127.0.0.1:8080/api/doctors/52 expected=HTTP 200 and API code 20000 api_code=20000

testcase.name: 重复医生手机号错误
testcase.system-out: POST http://127.0.0.1:8080/api/doctors expected=HTTP 200 and API code 10001 api_code=10001

testcase.name: 医生账号登录
testcase.system-out: POST http://127.0.0.1:8080/api/login expected=HTTP 200 and API code 20000 api_code=20000

testcase.name: 医生越权新增材料
testcase.system-out: POST http://127.0.0.1:8080/api/materials expected=HTTP 200 and API code 10003 api_code=10003

testcase.name: 医生只读访问仪表盘
testcase.system-out: GET http://127.0.0.1:8080/api/dashboard expected=HTTP 200 and API code 20000 api_code=20000

testcase.name: 管理员重置医生密码
testcase.system-out: PUT http://127.0.0.1:8080/api/doctors/reset/76 expected=HTTP 200 and API code 20000 api_code=20000

testcase.name: 旧密码在重置后失效
testcase.system-out: POST http://127.0.0.1:8080/api/login expected=HTTP 200 and API code 10002 api_code=10002

testcase.name: 默认重置密码登录
testcase.system-out: POST http://127.0.0.1:8080/api/login expected=HTTP 200 and API code 20000 api_code=20000

testcase.name: 上传 PNG 图片
testcase.system-out: POST http://127.0.0.1:8080/api/base/upload expected=HTTP 200 and API code 20000 api_code=20000

testcase.name: 拒绝非图片上传
testcase.system-out: POST http://127.0.0.1:8080/api/base/upload expected=HTTP 200 and API code 10000 api_code=10000

testcase.name: 新增必备材料
testcase.system-out: POST http://127.0.0.1:8080/api/materials expected=HTTP 200 and API code 20000 api_code=20000

testcase.name: 查询新增必备材料
testcase.system-out: GET http://127.0.0.1:8080/api/materials?pn=1&size=200&keyword=api-20260713T034632Z-9e2ae8-material expected=HTTP 200 and API code 20000 api_code=20000

testcase.name: 修改必备材料
testcase.system-out: PUT http://127.0.0.1:8080/api/materials/16 expected=HTTP 200 and API code 20000 api_code=20000

testcase.name: 新增医药公司政策
testcase.system-out: POST http://127.0.0.1:8080/api/company_policys expected=HTTP 200 and API code 20000 api_code=20000

testcase.name: 查询新增医药公司政策
testcase.system-out: GET http://127.0.0.1:8080/api/company_policys?pn=1&size=200&keyword=api-20260713T034632Z-9e2ae8-company-policy expected=HTTP 200 and API code 20000 api_code=20000

testcase.name: 修改医药公司政策
testcase.system-out: PUT http://127.0.0.1:8080/api/company_policys/124604 expected=HTTP 200 and API code 20000 api_code=20000

testcase.name: 新增医保政策
testcase.system-out: POST http://127.0.0.1:8080/api/medical_policys expected=HTTP 200 and API code 20000 api_code=20000

testcase.name: 查询新增医保政策
testcase.system-out: GET http://127.0.0.1:8080/api/medical_policys?pn=1&size=200&title=api-20260713T034632Z-9e2ae8-medical-policy expected=HTTP 200 and API code 20000 api_code=20000

testcase.name: 修改医保政策
testcase.system-out: PUT http://127.0.0.1:8080/api/medical_policys/1046 expected=HTTP 200 and API code 20000 api_code=20000

testcase.name: 新增药品
testcase.system-out: POST http://127.0.0.1:8080/api/drugs expected=HTTP 200 and API code 20000 api_code=20000

testcase.name: 查询新增药品
testcase.system-out: GET http://127.0.0.1:8080/api/drugs/1/200?name=api-20260713T034632Z-9e2ae8-drug expected=HTTP 200 and API code 20000 api_code=20000

testcase.name: 修改药品
testcase.system-out: PUT http://127.0.0.1:8080/api/drugs/12650476 expected=HTTP 200 and API code 20000 api_code=20000

testcase.name: 删除药品
testcase.system-out: DELETE http://127.0.0.1:8080/api/drugs/12650476 expected=HTTP 200 and API code 20000 api_code=20000

testcase.name: 删除医药公司政策
testcase.system-out: DELETE http://127.0.0.1:8080/api/company_policys/124604 expected=HTTP 200 and API code 20000 api_code=20000

testcase.name: 删除医保政策
testcase.system-out: DELETE http://127.0.0.1:8080/api/medical_policys/1046 expected=HTTP 200 and API code 20000 api_code=20000

testcase.name: 删除必备材料
testcase.system-out: DELETE http://127.0.0.1:8080/api/materials/16 expected=HTTP 200 and API code 20000 api_code=20000

testcase.name: 删除医生
testcase.system-out: DELETE http://127.0.0.1:8080/api/doctors/52 expected=HTTP 200 and API code 20000 api_code=20000

testcase.name: 删除销售地点
testcase.system-out: DELETE http://127.0.0.1:8080/api/sales/12635294 expected=HTTP 200 and API code 20000 api_code=20000

testcase.name: 删除医药公司
testcase.system-out: DELETE http://127.0.0.1:8080/api/companys/11265483 expected=HTTP 200 and API code 20000 api_code=20000

testcase.name: 删除城市
testcase.system-out: DELETE http://127.0.0.1:8080/api/citys/12630294 expected=HTTP 200 and API code 20000 api_code=20000

testcase.name: 管理员退出登录
testcase.system-out: POST http://127.0.0.1:8080/api/logout expected=HTTP 200 and API code 20000 api_code=20000

testcase.name: 退出后 Token 失效
testcase.system-out: GET http://127.0.0.1:8080/api/permissions expected=HTTP 200 and API code 10006 api_code=10006
